rulings.Case Title: NOREEN CORRY VS. RESIDENTIAL RENT STABLIZATION AND ARBITRATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Petitioner'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday August 12, 2016, line 1. Hearing On Petitioner'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate is DENIED. Administrative Law Judge did not abuse her discretion, there was a fair trial and findings are supported by the evidence. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHANIE BRANDON ET AL VS. THIRD BAPTIST GARDENS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday August 12, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT THIRD BAPTIST GARDENS, INC. Notice Of Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action is DENIED. First and Second causes of action (also see prayer for relief) state e a "real property claim" as they affect title by impeding its transferability until Government Code 65863.10-11 and SF Admin Code 60.8 are complied with. = (501/REQ)
